additionalDocuments.notes: Required in your state before driving abroad
additionalDocuments.ifMissing: Your home state may not permit driving internationally without an IDP

additionalNotes: Your US state requires an IDP for international driving — obtain one from AAA or AATA before departure.
Requirements vary significantly by US state. Some states require an IDP alongside a foreign license.

additionalDocuments.notes: Mandatory — US policies do not cover Mexico
additionalDocuments.ifMissing: You may be detained, fined, or held liable for all accident costs
